
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Rooster|kanji=己酉|romaji=tsuchinoto tori|onyomi=kishū|p=jǐyǒu|w=chi-yu|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gei2 jau5|j=gei2 jau5|ci=kei jɐu|mc=kɨj jɨu|oc-bs=kɯʔ jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Rooster also known as  Tsuchinoto-tori''' (己酉) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 46th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|ja|1=Yang Earth Monkey|2=ja|戊申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boshin (Sexagenary cycle)|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kōjutsu|ja|1=Yang Metal Dog|2=ja|庚戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōjutsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth (Wu Xing)|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|qid=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal (Wu Xing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (Wu Xing)|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, resulting in a {{ill|Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu Xing#Mutual generation (Xiangsheng)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}} (Earth generates Metal) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Rooster (己酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): giyu (기유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Dậu

==Years of Yin Earth Rooster==
Years in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leave a remainder of 49 when divided by 60 correspond to the year of Tsuchinoto-tori.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Tsuchinoto-tori'''
|-
!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st millennium|1=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium|1=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
*{{ill|49|en|49|qid=Q237986|lt=49|1=49}}
*{{ill|109|en|109|qid=Q396016|lt=109|1=109}}
*{{ill|169|en|169|qid=Q30280|lt=169|1=169}}
*{{ill|229|en|229|qid=Q32175|lt=229|1=229}}
*{{ill|289|en|289|qid=Q33755|lt=289|1=289}}
*{{ill|349|en|349|qid=Q32121|lt=349|1=349}}
*{{ill|409|en|409|qid=Q32736|lt=409|1=409}}
*{{ill|469|en|469|qid=Q30494|lt=469|1=469}}
*{{ill|529|en|529|qid=Q30710|lt=529|1=529}}
*{{ill|589|en|589|qid=Q31429|lt=589|1=589}}
*{{ill|649|en|649|qid=Q31117|lt=649|1=649}}
*{{ill|709|en|709|qid=Q23514|lt=709|1=709}}
*{{ill|769|en|769|qid=Q30697|lt=769|1=769}}
*{{ill|829|en|829|qid=Q30357|lt=829|1=829}}
*{{ill|889|en|889|qid=Q23833|lt=889|1=889}}
*{{ill|949|en|949|qid=Q24352|lt=949|1=949}}
|
*{{ill|1009|en|1009|qid=Q19236|lt=1009|1=1009}}
*{{ill|1069|en|1069|qid=Q19424|lt=1069|1=1069}}
*{{ill|1129|en|1129|qid=Q23463|lt=1129|1=1129}}
*{{ill|1189|en|1189|qid=Q19735|lt=1189|1=1189}}
*{{ill|1249|en|1249|qid=Q5485|lt=1249|1=1249}}
*{{ill|1309|en|1309|qid=Q5726|lt=1309|1=1309}}
*{{ill|1369|en|1369|qid=Q6211|lt=1369|1=1369}}
*{{ill|1429|en|1429|qid=Q6326|lt=1429|1=1429}}
*{{ill|1489|en|1489|qid=Q6665|lt=1489|1=1489}}
*{{ill|1549|en|1549|qid=Q6554|lt=1549|1=1549}}
*{{ill|1609|en|1609|qid=Q6762|lt=1609|1=1609}}
*{{ill|1669|en|1669|qid=Q7602|lt=1669|1=1669}}
*{{ill|1729|en|1729|qid=Q6952|lt=1729|1=1729}}
*{{ill|1789|en|1789|qid=Q7772|lt=1789|1=1789}}
*{{ill|1849|en|1849|qid=Q7650|lt=1849|1=1849}}
*{{ill|1909|en|1909|qid=Q2057|lt=1909|1=1909}}
*{{ill|1969|en|1969|qid=Q2485|lt=1969|1=1969}}
|
*{{ill|2029|en|2029|qid=Q12803|lt=2029|1=2029}}
*{{ill|2089|en|2089|qid=Q971983|lt=2089|1=2089}}
*[[:en:2149|2149]]
*{{ill|2209|en|2209|qid=Q32186196|lt=2209|1=2209}}
*[[:en:2269|2269]]
*[[:en:2329|2329]]
*[[:en:2389|2389]]
*[[:en:2449|2449]]
*[[2509]]
*[[2569]]
*[[2629]]
*[[2689]]
*[[2749]]
*[[2809]]
*[[2869]]
*[[:en:2929|2929]]
*[[:en:2989|2989]]
|}
=== Events ===
* The {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō era|1=Keichō}} 14th year (1609) - The {{ill|Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|ja|己酉約条|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Treaty of Tsuchinoto-tori|1=Japan–Korea Agreement of 1609|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11479876}} (Keichō Treaty) was concluded.

==Months of Yin Earth Rooster==
In years where the last digit is 2 or 7 (where the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} is {{ill|Rin|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rin|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} or {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}}), the eighth month corresponds to the month of Tsuchinoto-tori. However, this may refer to the {{ill|Lunisolar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|qid=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro (solar term)|1=Bailu (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|qid=Q1193124|lt=Kanro|1=Hanlu}}).

==Days of Yin Earth Rooster==
=== Selection ===
=== 2 ===
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Rooster|qq=ja|己酉|version=98658250|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q905305|af|Aardhaan (astrologie)|cdo|Gī-iū|de|Erde-Hahn|hak|Kí-yû|ja|己酉|ko|기유|vi|Kỷ Dậu|za|Geijyoux|zh-min-nan|Kí-iú|zh-yue|己酉|zh|己酉|zh-min-nan|Teng-chik|zh-yue|丁丑|cdo|Dĭng-cṳ̄de|nds|Feuer-Büffelvi|de|Yin Earth Rooster|fr|Coq de terre|af|Vuuros (astrologie)|de|Feuer-Büffelen|en|Fire Ox|fr|Buffle de feushak|it|Ding-chṳ́id|ko|정축|vi|Đinh Sửu|za|Dingceij|zh|丁丑|ar|Yin Earth Rooster}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
